confrontation.declare: A confrontation has been declared. The accusation and eligible crew are now fixed.
confrontation.captain-owns-expiry: Five minutes. If the vote does not carry, the captain owns what follows.
confrontation.vote: Vote recorded. The envelope opens only if a strict majority carries.
confrontation.forced-burn: The majority carries. The envelope is open and the private objective is forfeit.
confrontation.deferred-reveal: I have retained the objective record. Its timing is now mine.
confrontation.resolution: The confrontation is resolved. The black box has the names and the tally.
